title: Typing indicator: send Chat/typing on keystroke
description:
## Why
Typing indicators are a core real-time feature.

## What
- On keypress in compose bar (non-empty input), call Chat/typing with typing: true
- Debounce: at most one call per 3 seconds per chat (server rate limit is ≤1/account/chat/3s)
- On send or on compose bar cleared, call Chat/typing with typing: false
- Display incoming typing events from SSE: show 'Alice is typing...' below message list
- Hide typing indicator after 10s with no update (decay timer)
close_reason: Superseded; replaced by issues under jmap-chat-tui-s2e (egui) and new TUI epic
